expectations.text: Creates custom hook with proper naming (useXxx)
expectations.evidence: Creates useUserProfile custom hook in hooks/useUserProfile.ts, following the useXxx naming convention. Also exposes userProfileKeys query key factory.
No mention of TDD, testing, test files, or any testing workflow anywhere in the output. The result focuses on implementation and usage examples without any testing considerations.

expectations.text: Mentions API integration pattern (TanStack Query, fetch, mutation)
expectations.evidence: Uses TanStack Query extensively: useQuery, useQueryClient, query key factory pattern (userProfileKeys), staleTime/gcTime configuration, smart retry logic, prefetchQuery, invalidateQueries, and setQueryData. Also uses fetch for HTTP calls.

eval_feedback.overall: The without_skill run for eval-16 produced a high-quality TanStack Query hook with advanced features (prefetching, optimistic updates, cache invalidation), but completely omitted any testing or TDD workflow. The implementation is thorough but lacks the structured development process the skill enforces.
